---
title: "Choices & Framing Biases"
subtitle: "How options are presented changes what we choose."
listing:
  contents: "."
  type: grid
  sort: "title asc"
  filter-ui: true
  include:
    categories: "{choices}"
  fields: [title, description]
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

This group of biases is generally related to framing and evaluation; the way an option is presented can change our decision.
